semantic.role: TypeScript compiler configuration for the ArchSpine project
responsibilities: Define compilation target, module system, and output directory
invariants: strict must be true to ensure type safety
forceConsistentCasingInFileNames must be true to avoid cross-platform casing issues
rootDir must be './src' to keep output structure mirroring source
include must cover all source files under src/

English.role: TypeScript compiler configuration for the ArchSpine project

parameter_definitions.target: Sets the ECMAScript target version. 'ESNext' uses the latest supported features, balancing compatibility with modern runtime support.
parameter_definitions.module: Specifies module code generation. 'NodeNext' enables Node.js native ESM support, impacting how imports/exports are emitted.
parameter_definitions.moduleResolution: Determines how modules are resolved. 'NodeNext' aligns with Node.js modern resolution algorithm, affecting how external packages are located.
parameter_definitions.outDir: Output directory for compiled JavaScript files. Must be accessible by the runtime; ensures separation from source.
parameter_definitions.rootDir: Root directory of input source files. Must match project structure to avoid unexpected output paths.
parameter_definitions.strict: Enables all strict type-checking options. Prevents many common errors at compile time, improving runtime reliability.
parameter_definitions.esModuleInterop: Enables compatibility between ES modules and CommonJS. Reduces errors when using default imports from CJS modules.
parameter_definitions.skipLibCheck: Skips type checking of declaration files. Speeds up compilation but may miss issues in third-party types. Use cautiously.
parameter_definitions.forceConsistentCasingInFileNames: Enforces case-sensitive file names across platforms. Prevents subtle bugs on case-insensitive file systems.
parameter_definitions.types: List of type definition packages to include. 'node' provides Node.js API types.
parameter_definitions.sourceMap: Generates source map files for debugging. Increases output size but aids development and production error tracking.

English.stability_and_risks: This tsconfig.json defines the TypeScript compilation pipeline. Setting strict to true is a critical safety invariant that prevents many type-related bugs. The use of ESNext and NodeNext ensures the project uses modern JavaScript features and module resolution, but requires a compatible Node.js version. skipLibCheck improves build speed but may hide type errors in dependencies; periodic full checks are recommended. Consistent casing enforcement avoids platform-dependent failures. Overall, this configuration promotes robust and maintainable code but must be kept in sync with the actual runtime environment, especially module resolution and target.
